reviews.review_description:
I'm glad I came across this arcade gem. The ganeplay is fast paced enough (got to be fast snd pay a bit of attention, but has yet to get frustrating as some other arcade titles can) and definitely a fun time.
It looks goid and plays perfectly, so I definitely recommend everyone who wants another great arcade title in VR to snatch this gem up!
This game is very enjoyable. I like the fast paced movement and putting together the little pet toys. The only thing missing is an endless mode!
